easy.title: Create a Grocery List with Categories
easy.description: Build a categorized grocery list using nested unordered lists. Categories: Fruits, Vegetables, Dairy. Each category has at least 3 items.
easy.starterCode: Grocery List

medium.title: Build a Recipe Page with Steps and Ingredients
medium.description: Create a recipe page for your favorite dish. Use an unordered list for ingredients and an ordered list for step-by-step instructions. Include a description list for recipe metadata (prep time, cook time, servings).
medium.starterCode: Recipe Title
medium.solution:
🍝 Spaghetti Carbonara

Prep Time
10 mins
Cook Time
20 mins
Servings
4
Difficulty
Medium

Ingredients

  • 400g spaghetti
  • 200g guanciale or pancetta
  • 4 large eggs
  • 100g Pecorino Romano cheese
  • 100g Parmigiano Reggiano
  • Freshly ground black pepper
  • Salt

Instructions

  1. Bring a large pot of salted water to boil.
  2. Cook spaghetti according to package directions.
  3. While pasta cooks, cut guanciale into small strips.
  4. Cook guanciale in a skillet until crispy and fat renders.
  5. Whisk eggs with grated cheeses and pepper.
  6. Drain pasta, reserving 1 cup of pasta water.
  7. Remove skillet from heat. Add pasta to the skillet.
  8. Pour egg mixture over pasta, tossing quickly.
  9. Add pasta water gradually until creamy.
  10. Serve immediately with extra cheese and pepper.

hard.title: Build a Collapsible Table of Contents with Nested Lists
hard.description: Create a collapsible table of contents for a technical documentation page. Use deeply nested ordered/unordered lists. Implement JavaScript to collapse/expand sections. Style with CSS counters for legal numbering.
hard.starterCode: Documentation
hard.solution:
📖 JavaScript Documentation

Table of Contents

  1. Introduction to JavaScript
  2. JavaScript Basics
    Toggle Sub-sections
    1. Variables and Data Types
    2. Operators
    3. Control Flow
      Toggle Sub-sections
      1. If/Else Statements
      2. Loops (for, while)
      3. Switch Statements
    4. Functions
  3. DOM Manipulation
    Toggle Sub-sections
    1. Selecting Elements
    2. Event Handling
    3. Modifying the DOM
  4. Advanced Topics

Click the Toggle Sub-sections buttons to expand/collapse nested lists.
